title: Launched Perps v2 on mainnet
summary: Perps v2 with cross-margining and improved oracle routing went live.

title: Aggregator routing volume up 38% week-over-week
summary: Routing volume grew meaningfully week-over-week after the perps launch.

title: Opened 4 senior backend and infra roles
summary: Careers page lists 4 new backend and reliability roles, emphasizing Solana RPC experience.

title: Perpetuals open interest reached all-time high
summary: Open interest across DOT, SOL, and ETH perps crossed prior ATH this week.

title: Closed $25M Series B led by Polychain
summary: Series B adds runway for cross-margined derivatives expansion.

title: Founder posted about RPC reliability pain
summary: Founder publicly called out RPC instability during a volatility event on X.

title: Lend V2 now live with isolated markets
summary: Isolated markets and expanded collateral types shipped with Lend V2.

title: Hired Head of Infra from prior lending protocol
summary: New Head of Infra joined from a mature DeFi lending team.

title: Liquidation events spiked during SOL volatility window
summary: Cluster of liquidations during the April 14 volatility window stressed keeper infra.

title: Integrated with Kamino vaults for yield routing
summary: Announced mutual integration to route lending deposits into Kamino vaults.

title: Launched compressed NFT surfaces across marketplace
summary: Expanded cNFT support across collection pages and wallet views.

title: Featured in The Block on Solana NFT resurgence
summary: Long-form coverage positions ME as the anchor marketplace.

title: Posted 3 data infrastructure roles
summary: Indexing, pipelines, and ETL specialist roles all opened in the same week.

title: Weekly trade volume crossed $120M
summary: Highest weekly volume in the past quarter, driven by several blue-chip collection launches.

title: Founder tweeted about transaction parsing headaches
summary: Thread detailed pain with third-party txn parsing around complex NFT listings.

title: Shipped in-wallet Swap v3
summary: Swap v3 with improved routing and per-transaction cost transparency.

title: Raised at reported $3B valuation
summary: Follow-on financing per press coverage — specifics not yet confirmed.

title: Backpack Exchange rolled out to select US users
summary: Centralized exchange surface now live for a waitlisted cohort.

title: Senior wallet infrastructure role posted
summary: Role explicitly calls out experience with Solana transaction parsing and webhooks.

title: Block engine integration announced with major DEX
summary: Expands bundle submission surface — adjacent but not directly competitive.

title: Sage Labs mini-app released to public
summary: New crafting loop released publicly. Expected to increase on-chain item activity.

title: In-game economy transactions up after Sage update
summary: Daily active wallets and item transfer volumes noticeably higher post-update.

title: Unknown account — intentional bad domain
summary: Included in the sample to demonstrate the skip-with-warning path.
